title: What is the purpose of the emojis in the date column?
excerpt:
What is the purpose for the emoji’s in the date column?  Is it just a visual cue or some other reason? Can it be used with automations? 
Thanks

posts.author: traveler (Dean Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml:
What is the purpose for the emoji’s in the date column? Is it just a visual cue or some other reason? Can it be used with automations?
Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dean!

You’re correct. The purpose of these symbols are for your own personalisation, primarily to act as a visual queue (as you mentioned!). Automating these symbols is a great idea, and we encourage you to submit this as a feature request
